analysis_window.paper_description: one month with several storm surges

method_contract.local_newtonian_attraction: empirically reduced using HELBH local tide-gauge measurements before NTOL comparison
method_contract.solid_earth_tide_and_otl: local tidal analysis using three years of iGrav data with ET34-X-V80
method_contract.atmosphere: ATMACS without its later NTOL term
method_contract.ocean_model: BSH-HBMnoku hourly SSH snapshots conservatively remapped to 1/8 degree
method_contract.elastic_loading: SPOTL NLOADF with Gutenberg-Bullen Earth model
method_contract.model_detiding: three-year ET34-X-V80 analysis using the observation wave grouping

rounding_policy: Use Table 1 value 49 percent for the registered monthly target; 50 percent is narrative rounding. Use 85 nm/s^2, not outreach-page almost-90 wording.
